headline: Redburn Lowers ServiceNow (NOW) Price Target to $215
summary: ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 10, 2026, Rothschild & Co Redburn lowered the price target on ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW) from $230 to $215 while maintaining a Buy rating on the company’s stock. The firm’s analyst noted that ServiceNow, Inc. (NYSE:NOW)’s extensive platform integrations, IT […]
